purpose: hexa_sim_atlas_ingest (현 단일 도메인) → 모든 ω-cycle 산출물 흡수 도구 evolution path. 사용자 발견: BT-541~547 7대난제 ω-cycle, R5 Low-Mach lemma chain, BT-544 5-witness localization, Cross-BT 6/6 method-gap pattern, Honesty triad REPO_INVARIANT — 이 모든 보조 finding 들도 atlas 흡수 대상.
trigger: user 2026-04-26 보조 finding 들 (R5/BT-544/Cross-BT/Honesty triad) 제공 + '보조 되는것까지 흡수는???' + '도구 진화 오메가 사이클'.
method: main-thread multi-axis ideation. 현 도구 (단일 도메인 hexa_sim 16 bridges) 의 한계 + 일반화 axes 표면화. 16 axes → 5 cluster → Tier-1 5개 / Tier-2 4개 / Tier-3 3개 / REJECT 4개.

outside_findings_to_absorb.facts: α(s)=max(0,1-s/2), Lemma 1 Δα=1/2, Lemma 2 α(2)=0, D3 finite-s* barrier s*=2
D3.A + EXT-A + EXT-B + EXT-C + cross-BT P9 → Λ²(ℝ³) vortex-stretching, BKM 1984 통일
PATTERN_STRONGLY_GENERAL — Family A vs Family B 도달 불가능 strip, BT-541~546 통일 패턴
n6+nexus 6/6 KEEP_AS_IS, 5 preconditions, cross-repo audit framework
Y1 peripheral-moment SLE_6 × GUE / Y4 GATE-BARRIER / β_0 + A3/A4 / Triple-resonance KdV 6-soliton / 등

axes_surfaced.name: static_vs_dynamic_registry
axes_surfaced.summary: _facts() hardcoded 26 → witness JSON glob 으로 dynamic. design/**/*omega_cycle*.json scan.

axes_surfaced.name: manual_vs_auto_type_classification
axes_surfaced.summary: @P/@C/@F/@L/@R/@S/@X 자동분류 heuristic. numeric=@C, formula 표현=@F, 'law/criterion/bound'=@L, multi-source=@X, 그래프 의존=@R, 군구조=@S.

axes_surfaced.name: single_shard_vs_per_source_shard
axes_surfaced.summary: atlas.append.hexa-sim-bridges.n6 (현) vs per-cycle: atlas.append.bt-541-rh.n6 / atlas.append.bt-544-ns.n6 / atlas.append.honesty-triad.n6 ...

axes_surfaced.name: absorption_explicit_vs_default
axes_surfaced.summary: --absorb explicit flag (현, 안전) vs default-on. REJECT — main atlas.n6 직접 변경은 안전상 explicit 만.

axes_surfaced.name: single_repo_vs_cross_repo
axes_surfaced.summary: nexus only (현) vs nexus + n6 + anima + hexa-lang + airgenome + hive 6-repo aggregate. 5 preconditions (Honesty triad) 자동검증.

axes_surfaced.name: grade_policy_3tier_vs_extended
axes_surfaced.summary: 현 [7]/[10*]/[11*] 3-tier vs PASS_LITERATURE / PROBE_RUN / BARRIER_CONFIRMED / NEGATIVE_VERDICT 등 풍부한 token. atlas.n6 의 'd.r' alien index 활용.

axes_surfaced.name: idempotence_with_dynamic_input
axes_surfaced.summary: raw 68 byte-eq 보장 (dynamic input 에서도). facts sort by (type, id) 안정 정렬.

axes_surfaced.name: atlas_dsl_v1_vs_v2
axes_surfaced.summary: atlas DSL v1 (현) vs v2 신규 type? @M meta-axis? @T trace? 별도 architectural ω-cycle 필요. DEFER.

axes_surfaced.name: cycle_discovery_manual_vs_auto
axes_surfaced.summary: manual list (현) vs auto-glob design/**/*omega_cycle*.json. cycle 신규 추가 시 zero-config 흡수.

axes_surfaced.name: conflict_resolution
axes_surfaced.summary: first-write wins / last-write wins / version-tag / manual escalate. REJECT last-write (data loss); MANUAL_ESCALATE 권장.

axes_surfaced.name: history_pruning
axes_surfaced.summary: raw 77 append-only forever (현) vs status-field GC. atlas-ingest history 가 무한 성장 — GC threshold 설계.

axes_surfaced.name: lens_injection_auto
axes_surfaced.summary: atlas facts → 1588 lens score 자동 binding (Tier-3 from earlier). 별도 ω-cycle 필요. DEFER.

axes_surfaced.name: doc_auto_generation
axes_surfaced.summary: atlas state → markdown auto-emit (README.md / SYNTHESIS_<date>.md 갱신). 본 세션 SYNTHESIS_2026-04-26.md 가 manual 첫 사례.

axes_surfaced.name: falsifier_auto_spawn
axes_surfaced.summary: each new fact → corresponding F# falsifier auto-create. F1-F12 패턴 generalize. DEFER (별도 ω-cycle).

axes_surfaced.name: atlas_integrity_check
axes_surfaced.summary: @X members 모두 존재 검증 + @R 체인 dangling 검출 + grade consistency 검증. 후속 verifier 도구.

dedupe_method: (1) REJECT a5 (default-on absorption — 안전상 explicit flag 만); (2) REJECT a11 last-write 옵션 (data loss); (3) cluster 5 family: A=architecture/scope (a1/a4/a6), B=input (a2/a10), C=output/audit (a8/a12/a14), D=intelligence (a3/a7/a9), E=ecosystem (a13/a15/a16); (4) Tier 분류 by impl-readiness + first-cycle ROI + raw rule alignment.

tier_1_immediate_impl_next_cycle.rationale: design/**/*omega_cycle*.json glob → 신규 cycle 자동흡수. 가장 큰 ROI (manual maintenance 제거).
witness JSON 파싱 후 fact 별 @P/@C/@F/@L/@R/@S/@X 자동분류 heuristic. atlas DSL 미사용 type 활성화.
atlas.append.<cycle_slug>.n6 per witness. file proliferation 허용 — atlas 의 atlas.append.* 패턴 이미 존재.
PASS_LITERATURE / PROBE_RUN / BARRIER_CONFIRMED / NEGATIVE_VERDICT token 추가. 현 3-tier 보존 + 신규 token suffix 허용.
6-repo glob (nexus + n6 + anima + hexa-lang + airgenome + hive). Honesty triad 5 preconditions 자동검증.

tier_2_backlog.blocker: Tier-1 a10/a3/a4/a6 가 단일 도구 안에서 가능; 분리는 후속
Tier-1 impl 후 sort 안정성 검증
a3 type-classification 안정 후 markdown emit
별도 verifier 도구 (atlas_integrity_verify.hexa) 가 더 적합

tier_3_defer_or_split.reason: architectural change — 별도 ω-cycle 필요 (atlas.n6 v2 spec)
별도 ω-cycle (F# 패턴 generalize, registry expansion)
history 무한 성장 한참 후 evaluate

rejected_axes.reason: main atlas.n6 직접 변경 안전상 explicit --absorb 만. default-on 은 회수 어려움
data loss 위험; manual_escalate / version-tag 가 안전

omega_stop_witness.method: 16 axes 표면화 (5 cluster). second-pass 신규 0. atlas DSL 7 type 모두 cover.
omega_stop_witness.result: FIXPOINT — Tier-1 5개 / Tier-2 4개 / Tier-3 4개 / REJECT 2개 = 14+2 = 16 total

first_impl_target.name: tool/omega_cycle_atlas_ingest.hexa (신규, 진화 first-step)
first_impl_target.verification: schema-guard + idempotence + cross-repo dedup + integrity check
